title: The genetic landscape and clinical implication of pediatric Moyamoya angiopathy in an international cohort.
author: Zanoni P Steindl K Sticht H Oneda B Joset P Ivanovski I Horn AHC Cabello EM Laube J Zweier M Baumer A Rauch A Khan N
content: S-EPMC10325976 PMC10325976 The genetic landscape and clinical implication of pediatric Moyamoya angiopathy in an international cohort. Pediatric Moyamoya Angiopathy (MMA) is a progressive intracranial occlusive arteriopathy that represents a leading cause of transient ischemic attacks and strokes
